title: Asserting conditional skill logic via protocol-level regex checks
context: We needed to ensure that skill protocols remain consistent with the orchestrator rules without relying solely on manual documentation reviews.
content: When documenting conditional logic in SKILL.md files (e.g. omitting suggestions based on task attributes), enforce these boundaries by extending tests/test_skill_protocol.py to programmatically parse and assert the presence of specific keywords or constraints across all relevant SKILL.md files.
anti_patterns: Avoid relying purely on manual code review to verify that skill documentation contains required protocol changes; enforce them programmatically using static regex tests.
